Petition To Determine Invalidity Of December 28, 2014 Amendments To The Laura Yee Marital Trust And The Moon Park Yee Residuary Trusts B-1 And B-2; Cancellation Of Trust Instrument
Off Calendar Jan-13-2020 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Petition to Determine Invalidity of December 28, 2014 Amendments, etc., Petition to Compel Accounting, and Petition for Instructions, etc. are off calendar.

Petition To Determine Invalidity Of December 28, 2014 Amendments To The Laura Yee Marital Trust And The Moon Park Yee Residuary Trusts B-1 And B-2; Cancellation Of Trust Instrument
Off Calendar Mar-18-2019 Continued To Jul-15-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: James Cilley for and with Martha Lee (Petitioner).
Andrew Contopoulos for Gloria Yee (Trustee).

Counsel reported that mediation is scheduled for May 14th, that they are hopeful that mediation goes a long way to get the matter fully resolved, that written discovery has been propounded and some depositions were taken, that they may still need to do witness depositions and suggested setting a status conference to set the matter for trial in the event it does not settle. The Petition to Determine Invalidity of December 28, 2014 Amendments, etc., Petition to Compel Accounting, and Petition for Instructions, etc. are continued to July 15, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

Petition To Compel Accounting
Off Calendar Mar-18-2019 Continued To Jul-15-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Determine Invalidity Of December 28, 2014 Amendments To The Laura Yee Marital Trust And The Moon Park Yee Residuary Trusts B-1 And B-2; Cancellation Of Trust Instrument
Off Calendar Sep-19-2018 Continued To Mar-18-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: James Cilley appeared by telephone for Martha Lee (Petitioner).
Andrew Contopoulos appeared by telephone for Gloria Yee (Trustee).

Mr. Cilley stated that they have had discussion, that he is waiting for a true up accounting, and that once they receive it they are hoping to do limited depositions and then move forward with private mediation. Mr. Brillant stated that they have discussed having mediation with Judge Gallagher from JAMS (Judicial Arbitration and Mediation Services). Counsel indicated that they should be ready for trial in March. The Petition to Determine Invalidity of December 28, 2014 Amendments, etc., Petition to Compel Accounting, and Petition for Instructions, etc. are continued to March 18, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

Petition To Determine Invalidity Of December 28, 2014 Amendments To The Laura Yee Marital Trust And The Moon Park Yee Residuary Trusts B-1 And B-2; Cancellation Of Trust Instrument
Off Calendar May-02-2018 Continued To Sep-12-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Mark Schmuck for Martha Lee (Petitioner).
Andrew Contopoulos for Gloria Yee (Trustee).

Mr. Schmuck stated that they are still conducting discovery, that their ultimate goal is to participate in mediation in both matters and reach global settlement, that they will hopefully complete mediation by August and requested the matter be put over to September. Mr. Contopolous stated that he has provided accountings for B-1 and B-2 (Sub Trusts), and the Marital Trust. The Court informed Counsel that the accountings have not been reviewed by the Court and if they can not resolve the issues, they will need to file a petition for approval of the accountings. Mr. Contopolous stated that their goal is to resolve the issues without the Court's involvement. The Petition to Determine Invalidity of December 28, 2014 Amendments, etc., Petition to Compel Accounting, and Petition for Instructions, etc. are continued to September 12, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 by which time the parties anticipate having mediation completed. If a continuance is needed, the Parties are to contact the Court one week in advance of the hearing.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

Petition To Determine Invalidity Of December 28, 2014 Amendments To The Laura Yee Marital Trust And The Moon Park Yee Residuary Trusts B-1 And B-2; Cancellation Of Trust Instrument
Off Calendar Nov-27-2017 Continued To Mar-26-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Mark Schmuck for and with Martha Lee (Petitioner).
Andrew Contopoulos for Gloria Yee (Trustee).

Mr. Schmuck stated that the accountings on the Sub Trusts have been submitted to his office, that he filed his objections, that the Filing Clerk rejected them because a petition for approval of the accounting has not been filed, and that he retitled the document "Petition for Instructions Regarding Objections to Accountings" and refiled it with a hearing date of today. Counsel also asked that the matter be put out for four months stating that there have been co-mingling of the accounts for 15-years, that they need to do some discovery and that they are discussing mediation. The Court advised Mr. Schmuck that he will have to file a petition for surcharge or removal of Trustee. The Petition to Determine Invalidity of Amendments, etc. and Petition to Compel Accountings are continued to March 26, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

Off Calendar Sep-11-2017 Continued To Nov-27-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: James Ciley for and with Martha Lee.
Andrew Cantopolous for Gloria Yee Respondent.

Mr. Ciley stated that he received an accounting for the Residual Trust, that because there was co-mingling he is still waiting on an accounting for the Marital/Survivor's Trust and that there will be responses/objections to the accountings. Mr. Cantopolous stated that he anticipates having the accounting on the Survivor's Trust to Mr. Ciley in about two weeks, that he has propounded discovery and that it is due in 30-days. The Petition to Determine Invalidity of December 28, 2014 Amendments, etc. and the Petition to Compel Accounting are continued to November 27, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of discovery and the objections.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Cathy Nelson for and with Martha Lee (Petitioner/Beneficiary).
Andrew Contopoulos for Gloria Yee (Respondent/Trustee).

Mr. Contopoulos stated that they are in the process of preparing an accounting for the residuary Trusts B-1 and B-2, and that he believes no accounting is needed for the Marital Trust because the Petitioner is not a Beneficiary. Ms. Nelson raised the issue of breach of fiduciary duty and undue influence with regard to the amendments, and stated that she anticipates doing some discovery. The Petition to Determine Validity of Amendments, etc. and the Petition to Compel Accounting are continued to May 22, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Court Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.
